name: Pelvic Curl
setup: Supine, knees bent, feet hip-width, arms long by sides.
exhale: Articulate spine off the mat into bridge
inhale: Hold at top, then roll down on next exhale
cues: Initiate from a posterior pelvic tilt
Peel one vertebra at a time
Keep weight even across both feet

name: Spine Twist Supine
setup: Supine, legs in tabletop, arms in T position.
exhale: Return legs to center
inhale: Rotate legs to one side, keeping shoulders anchored
cues: Move both knees as one unit
Keep opposite shoulder heavy
Rotation comes from the waist

name: Chest Lift
setup: Supine, knees bent, hands interlaced behind head.
exhale: Flex trunk, lifting head and chest
cues: Lead with the sternum, not the chin
Keep the pelvis neutral
Eyes on your knees

name: Chest Lift with Rotation
setup: Supine in chest lift position, hands behind head.
exhale: Rotate the lifted trunk to one side
cues: Rotate from the ribcage
Keep elbows wide
Maintain the height of the lift

name: Parallel Heels
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine, legs parallel, heels on footbar, feet hip-width apart.
exhale: Straighten legs
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Initiate movement with hip extensors
Keep feet dorsiflexed and stable as if standing on floor
Straighten legs completely, avoiding hyperextension
Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization

name: Parallel Toes
setup: Supine, legs parallel, toes on footbar with heels lifted and still.
exhale: Straighten legs
cues: Keep heels at one constant height
Press evenly through all five toes
No movement in the ankle during the press

name: V Position Toes
setup: Supine, heels together toes apart in small V, toes on footbar.
exhale: Straighten legs
cues: Rotation comes from the hips, not the feet
Keep heels glued together
Knees track over the second toe

name: Open V Heels
setup: Supine, legs in wide V, heels on the footbar.
exhale: Straighten legs
objectives: Pelvic stability with a wide base
cues: Keep the pelvis quiet as legs press
Track knees over toes
Feel inner thighs gather on the return

name: Open V Toes
setup: Supine, legs in wide V, toes on the footbar, heels lifted.
exhale: Straighten legs
objectives: Even leg work in a wide stance
cues: Heels stay still and level
Press from the back of the legs
Avoid gripping the toes

name: Calf Raises
setup: Supine, legs straight, toes on footbar, heels under the bar.
exhale: Press heels under the bar (lower)
inhale: Lift heels, rising onto the toes
objectives: Full ankle range with a stable knee
cues: Keep knees straight but not locked
Lower heels as far as they go
Move only at the ankle

name: Prances
setup: Supine, legs straight, toes on footbar; alternate bending one knee as the other heel presses down.
exhale: Change legs
cues: Keep the carriage still as legs alternate
Roll through the foot like walking
Even rhythm side to side

name: Parallel Heels (Chair)
setup: Seated tall on the chair, heels on the pedal, legs parallel.
exhale: Press the pedal down
cues: Sit tall out of the hips
Press without rocking the trunk
Control the pedal up — don't let it throw you

name: Parallel Toes (Chair)
setup: Seated tall, toes on the pedal, heels lifted, legs parallel.
exhale: Press the pedal down
cues: Heels stay at one height
Grow taller as you press
Even weight through both feet

name: Hundred Prep
setup: Supine, legs in tabletop, hands in straps, arms reaching to the ceiling.
exhale: Lift into chest lift as arms press down
cues: Reach the arms long as you curl
Keep tabletop still
Soften the neck — the work is in the trunk

name: Hundred
setup: Supine in chest lift, legs extended on a high diagonal, arms long in straps.
exhale: Pump arms for five counts
cues: Pump from the shoulder, arms straight
Keep the lift constant — don't bounce
Legs reach away from you

name: Coordination
setup: Supine in chest lift, elbows bent by ribs, hands in straps, legs in tabletop.
exhale: Press arms and legs out, open-close legs
inhale: Bend knees in, then return arms
cues: The trunk lift never changes
Sharp open-close from the hips
Sequence: arms-legs out, legs in, arms in

name: Mini Roll-Up
setup: Supine, hands on the roll-down bar, knees bent, feet flat.
exhale: Curl head and chest up, rolling toward the thighs
objectives: Using spring assistance to learn the roll-up
cues: Let the bar assist, not lead
Round over an imaginary ball
Lower one vertebra at a time

name: Frog
setup: Supine, feet in straps, knees bent and open, heels together.
exhale: Straighten legs on a low diagonal
objectives: Pelvic stability with legs in straps
cues: Press out through the heels
Keep the pelvis anchored
Resist the straps on the return

name: Down Circles
setup: Supine, feet in straps, legs straight on a diagonal.
exhale: Circle legs down and around
inhale: Close legs together at the bottom
objectives: Smooth circular motion from the hip
cues: Equal-sized circles each rep
The pelvis never rocks
Squeeze midline to finish each circle

name: Up Circles
setup: Supine, feet in straps, legs straight and together.
exhale: Open and circle legs up
inhale: Close at the top of the circle
cues: Initiate the opening from the hip
Keep tailbone heavy
Same tempo in both directions

name: Openings
setup: Supine, feet in straps, legs straight on a diagonal, in external rotation.
exhale: Open legs out to the sides
cues: Open only as far as the pelvis stays still
Resist on the way out
Power the closing from the inner thighs

name: Bottom Lift
setup: Supine, feet on footbar in parallel, knees bent.
exhale: Articulate the spine up into a bridge
cues: Keep the carriage absolutely still
Peel and re-place each vertebra
Knees reach over the toes at the top

name: Bottom Lift with Extension
setup: In bottom lift bridge position, feet on the footbar.
exhale: Press the carriage out, holding the bridge
cues: The pelvis height never changes
Press out only as far as you can hold
Hamstrings drag the carriage home

name: Short Spine Massage
setup: Supine, feet in straps, headrest down.
exhale: Fold legs over and roll the spine up
inhale: Bend knees toward shoulders, then roll down
cues: Roll up with the carriage still
Knees frame the shoulders on the descent
Lengthen the spine down the mat

name: Standing Lunge
setup: One foot against the shoulder rest, other foot on the floor, hands on the footbar.
exhale: Press the carriage out, sinking into the lunge
inhale: Hold and breathe into the stretch
cues: Square the pelvis forward
Sink down, not just back
Keep the front knee over the ankle

name: Hamstring Stretch
setup: One leg resting on the barrel, standing leg vertical, hands on the ladder.
exhale: Hinge forward over the lifted leg
inhale: Lengthen the spine before each fold
objectives: Maintaining a long spine in a stretch
cues: Fold from the hip, not the waist
Keep both hips facing the barrel
Soften the knee if the back rounds

name: Kneeling Lunge
setup: Back knee on the carriage, front foot on the floor or frame, hands on the footbar.
exhale: Press the carriage back, deepening the lunge
cues: Tuck the pelvis slightly to find the stretch
Grow tall through the crown
Control the carriage at all times

name: Scooter
setup: Standing beside the reformer, one foot on the carriage against the shoulder rest, hands on the footbar.
exhale: Press the carriage back with the standing-leg hip stable
objectives: Trunk stability over a moving base
cues: The trunk stays still — only the leg moves
Press from the hip, not the knee
Standing leg stays softly bent

name: Long Stretch
setup: Plank position, hands on footbar, feet against shoulder rests.
exhale: Press the carriage out, holding the plank
objectives: Plank integrity over a moving carriage
cues: One long line from head to heels
Move from the shoulders only
Don't let the hips pike or sag

name: Down Stretch
setup: Kneeling, feet against shoulder rests, hands on footbar, chest lifted in extension.
exhale: Press the carriage back
inhale: Return, sweeping the chest forward and up
cues: Lift the chest through the arms
Press the hips forward
Lead the return with the sternum

name: Up Stretch
setup: Pike position, hands on footbar, feet against shoulder rests, hips high.
exhale: Press the carriage out, lowering toward plank
inhale: Lift the hips, returning to pike
objectives: Moving between pike and plank with control
cues: Initiate the return from the abdominals
Keep the shoulders over the wrists in plank
Heels stay anchored on the rests

name: Elephant
setup: Standing on the carriage in a pike, heels down, hands on footbar.
exhale: Press the carriage back with straight legs
inhale: Draw the carriage in from the abdominals
objectives: Hamstring length in a closed chain
cues: Keep the trunk completely still
Drag the carriage in — don't kick it
Weight even through hands and feet

name: Teaser Prep
setup: Supine, knees bent in tabletop, arms reaching back overhead.
exhale: Roll up to balance behind the sit bones, legs in tabletop
inhale: Hold, then roll down with control
cues: Reach the arms toward the knees as you rise
Balance just behind the sit bones
Roll down one vertebra at a time

name: Extension
setup: Supine, legs in tabletop, hands in straps, arms reaching to the ceiling.
exhale: Press the arms down to the carriage
cues: Arms straight but not locked
Keep the ribcage anchored
Resist the straps on the way up

name: Adduction
setup: Supine, legs in tabletop, arms open to the sides in the straps.
exhale: Draw the arms together above the chest
cues: Hug an imaginary barrel
Shoulders stay wide on the mat
Same path out and in

name: Circles Up
setup: Supine, legs in tabletop, arms long by the sides in straps.
exhale: Circle the arms out and up overhead
inhale: Press back down through the sides
objectives: Full shoulder range with a quiet trunk
cues: Keep ribs knitted as arms travel
Even, round circles
Reverse direction without losing tension

name: Triceps
setup: Supine, elbows bent and anchored by the ribs, hands in straps.
exhale: Straighten the arms along the body
inhale: Bend the elbows, keeping them still
cues: Elbows glued to the ribs
Move only from the elbow
Reach long through the fingertips

name: Leg Press Standing
setup: Standing tall on the chair facing forward, one foot on the pedal.
exhale: Press the pedal down
cues: Stand tall over the standing leg
Press without leaning
Knee tracks over the toes

name: Hamstring Curl
setup: Prone over the chair, hands on the frame, one or both feet on the pedal.
exhale: Curl the heels toward the seat
cues: Keep the pelvis pressed down
Curl from the back of the thigh
Slow on the return

name: Teaser 1
setup: Supine, legs extended on a high diagonal, arms reaching overhead.
exhale: Roll up to a V position, arms parallel to the legs
cues: Legs stay at one constant angle
Float the arms up with the trunk
Resist gravity on every vertebra down

name: Teaser 2
setup: Balanced in the teaser V position, arms reaching forward.
exhale: Lower and lift the legs, holding the trunk still
objectives: Hip flexor control with a stable trunk
cues: Only the legs move
Keep the chest lifted and open
Small range, total control

name: Star
setup: Side plank with one hand on the footbar, feet on the carriage.
exhale: Press the carriage out in the side plank
cues: Lift away from the supporting shoulder
One straight line, top to bottom
Reach the top arm to the sky

name: Mermaid
setup: Side-sitting on the carriage, inside hand on the footbar.
exhale: Press the carriage out, side-bending over the bar
cues: Lift up and over an imaginary fence
Keep both sit bones grounded
Open the top ribs to the ceiling

name: Saw
setup: Sitting tall, legs apart, arms in T position.
exhale: Rotate and reach past the little toe
cues: Rotate first, then reach
Keep both hips anchored
Saw past the toe three times

name: Side Stretch
setup: Side-sitting on the chair, outside hand on the pedal.
exhale: Press the pedal down, side-bending over it
cues: Bend sideways on one plane
Press and lift with equal control
Keep the hips stacked

name: Breast Stroke Prep
setup: Prone, forehead down, hands by the shoulders, legs together.
exhale: Lift the head and chest into a small extension
objectives: Extension without compressing the low back
cues: Reach the crown forward as you lift
Press gently through the hands
Keep the feet on the mat

name: Swan Basic
setup: Prone over the chair, hands on the pedal, legs long.
exhale: Lift the chest as the pedal rises
objectives: Sequencing extension from upper to lower spine
cues: Lead with the chest, not the chin
Let the pedal assist the lift
Lengthen — don't crunch — the low back

name: Pulling Straps I
setup: Prone on the long box, chest just off the edge, hands holding the straps.
exhale: Pull the straps back, lifting the chest into extension
cues: Slide the shoulder blades down as you pull
Lift the chest as the arms travel
Keep the legs reaching long behind you
